indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: open floor area
indicators.rationale: The open floor area allows for unobstructed movement and stretching.

indicators.name: couches and chairs
indicators.rationale: Couches and chairs obstruct the open floor area and create visual clutter.

indicators.name: stools and bar stools
indicators.rationale: Stools and bar stools obstruct the open floor area and create visual clutter.

indicators.name: kitchen island
indicators.rationale: The kitchen island occupies a significant portion of the open floor area and obstructs movement.

reasoning_summary: The scene has a hardwood floor and an open floor area, which are positive indicators for yoga. However, the presence of couches, chairs, stools, and a kitchen island obstruct the open floor space and create visual clutter, making it marginally adequate for yoga.
